note: Stage-1 ROUND 3 (image, bGPT, clic2024). Round-2 CONVERGED lr=3e-4 (higher diverges), lora_r=32 (64 overfits), attn-only (MLP fine at 3e-4 but goes very negative at higher lr) — all FROZEN. Only the two mild edges remain: train_interval (2 beat 4; test 1) x epochs (clic liked 5>3). 4 runs -> then freeze. Image online gain is intrinsically small (~2.5-2.7% on clic at dev scale); its real magnitude comes from Stage-2 data scaling, not more tuning.
